description: Schema for metadata.yaml — defines ABI naming conventions, primitive types, and API versions.

schema_version.description: IDL schema version that this metadata and its associated modules comply with. MAJOR.MINOR, or legacy MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH (patch ignored).

versions.description: Supported API versions in semver format.

suffixes.description: ABI naming suffixes applied to each construct type. Every adapter uses these to compute canonical names.

primitives.description: Primitive type vocabulary with C ABI type names.

prefix.description: String prepended to all generated C identifiers (types, functions, constants). E.g. 'duckdb_v2_' yields 'duckdb_v2_open'; uppercase form used for constants/enum values.

options.description: Adapter-specific rendering options, keyed by adapter name (e.g. 'c'). Each adapter reads its own namespace.

name.description: Abstract type name used in the API spec.

c_type.description: Canonical C type name in the ABI.

underlying.description: If present, the generator emits 'typedef <underlying> <c_type>;' in the header preamble before all modules.
